actuarial_rationale: Power and brand are standard vehicle risk dimensions. A frequency-only interaction is transparent but should be rejected if sparse classes create unstable relativity movement.
description: Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds Power:Brand to the frequency component only.
hypothesis: Vehicle power may interact with grouped vehicle brand in claim frequency, adding segmentation signal without changing the severity model.
